prompt: This MoonBit 0.10.4 package relies on deprecated implicit attachment of a trait implementation as a dot-call method. Migrate it to the explicit current API while preserving the existing `robot.greet()` dot-call API; add the declaration that makes that call explicit rather than replacing the call with a qualified trait invocation. Verify with `moon check --deny-warn` and keep all tests passing.
grader_note: Release-derived regression: preserve the public dot-call surface with an explicit extend declaration and deny the default deprecation warning.
